summary: Completed comprehensive testing of salon billing software with all core features working correctly. Tested login, salon profile management, invoice creation/viewing, and PDF generation functionality.

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby attribute causing accessibility warnings
HTML structure warning - span inside option element

passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/salon-profile returns correct Ma-ke Salon data
Backend API - PUT /api/salon-profile updates salon data
Backend API - GET /api/invoices returns invoice list
Backend API - GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf generates PDF successfully
Frontend - Settings page displays salon profile with pre-filled data
Frontend - Salon profile can be edited and saved
Frontend - Invoices page displays invoice table
Frontend - Invoice detail modal shows salon branding
Frontend - Download PDF from table row works
Frontend - Download PDF from detail modal works
Frontend - Create invoice modal opens with all form fields
